benefits.description: 100% healing of chronic idiopathic duodenal ulcer confirmed by endoscopy; stomach lining described as pink and perfect with no wounds
Felt noticeably better within 2-3 days of starting oral arginine salt BPC-157; significant improvement after a few weeks

protocol_notes: OP first used acetate salt BPC-157 subcutaneously and orally alongside CJC/Ipamorelin for approximately 2 months with no improvement. After discovering arginine salt BPC-157 (the form used in most studies), switched to oral administration of arginine salt BPC-157. Was simultaneously on Nexium (esomeprazole) 40mg for over 2 years with no healing prior to peptide use. Doctor confirmed full healing via endoscopy. OP is the founder of BioPrime/BioPure Supplements.
